decisions.what: Used type-only re-export (export type { FloatingScoreProps }) in FloatingScore.tsx and components/index.ts.
decisions.why: tsconfig has isolatedModules: true which requires type-only exports for re-exported interfaces.

decisions.what: Used window.setTimeout / window.clearTimeout inside useEffect with onComplete guard.
decisions.why: Browser timer typing returns number, and cleanup must run on unmount or dependency change to prevent calling onComplete after the component has been removed.

decisions.what: Treated value >= 0 as positive (rendered with '+' prefix and styles.positive).
decisions.why: Spec says '+ prefix for positive numbers' and positive class for green; zero is mapped to positive styling as the simplest non-ambiguous default.
CSS will-change syntax requires comma-separated values; the spec wording 'transform opacity' is interpreted as both properties.
